title: Kokomo Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Deployer exploit involving contract upgrade and token transfer

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with a known malicious contract address

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with a known malicious contract address
summary: Kokomo Finance, a lending protocol on Optimism, was exploited by the deployer who upgraded the contract to a malicious one, transferring tokens to themselves. A guard could have blocked the contract upgrade transaction.
